book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. MATTHEW

verses.text: Then spake Jesus to the multitude, and to his disciples,
Saying, \+w The scribes\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w the Pharisees\+w* \+w sit\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w Moses’\+w* \+w seat\+w*:

\+w All\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w whatsoever\+w* \+w they bid\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w observe\+w*, \+add that\+add* \+w observe\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w do\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w after\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w works\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they say\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w not\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w they bind\+w* \+w heavy\+w* \+w burdens\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w grievous to be borne\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w lay\+w* \+add them\+add* \+w on\+w* \+w men’s\+w* \+w shoulders\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w they themselves will\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w move\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w with one of\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w fingers\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w works\+w* \+w they do\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w to be seen\+w* \+w of men\+w*: \+w they make broad\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w phylacteries\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w enlarge\+w* \+w the borders\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w garments\+w*,
\+w And\+w* \+w love\+w* \+w the uppermost rooms\+w* \+w at\+w* \+w feasts\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the chief seats\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the synagogues\+w*,
\+w And\+w* \+w greetings\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the markets\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to be called\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w men\+w*, \+w Rabbi\+w*, \+w Rabbi\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w called\+w* \+w Rabbi\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Master\+w*, \+add even\+add* \+w Christ\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w brethren\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w call\+w* \+w no\+w* \+add man\+add* \+w your\+w* \+w father\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w the earth\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father\+w*, \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*.
\+w Neither\+w* \+w be ye called\+w* \+w masters\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Master\+w*, \+add even\+add* \+w Christ\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w he that is greatest\+w* \+w among you\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w servant\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall exalt\+w* \+w himself\+w* \+w shall be abased\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w he that\+w* \+w shall humble\+w* \+w himself\+w* \+w shall be exalted\+w*.

¶ \+w But woe\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w scribes\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w Pharisees\+w*, \+w hypocrites\+w*! \+w for\+w* \+w ye shut up\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w men\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w neither\+w* \+w go in\+w* \+add yourselves\+add*, \+w neither\+w* \+w suffer ye\+w* \+w them that are entering\+w* \+w to go in\+w*.

\+w Woe\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w scribes\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w Pharisees\+w*, \+w hypocrites\+w*! \+w for\+w* \+w ye devour\+w* \+w widows’\+w* \+w houses\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w for a pretence\+w* \+w make\+w* \+w long\+w* \+w prayer\+w*: \+w therefore\+w* \+w ye shall receive\+w* \+w the greater\+w* \+w damnation\+w*.

\+w Woe\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w scribes\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w Pharisees\+w*, \+w hypocrites\+w*! \+w for\+w* \+w ye compass\+w* \+w sea\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w land\+w* \+w to make\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w proselyte\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w he is made\+w*, \+w ye make\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w twofold more\+w* \+w the child\+w* \+w of hell\+w* \+w than yourselves\+w*.

\+w Woe\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+add ye\+add* \+w blind\+w* \+w guides\+w*, \+w which say\+w*, \+w Whosoever\+w* \+w shall swear\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the temple\+w*, \+w it is\+w* \+w nothing\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall swear\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the gold\+w* \+w of the temple\+w*, \+w he is a debtor\+w*!

\+add Ye\+add* \+w fools\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w blind\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w whether\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w greater\+w*, \+w the gold\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w the temple\+w* \+w that sanctifieth\+w* \+w the gold\+w*?

\+w And\+w*, \+w Whosoever\+w* \+w shall swear\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the altar\+w*, \+w it is\+w* \+w nothing\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w sweareth\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the gift\+w* \+w that is upon\+w* \+w it\+w*, \+w he is guilty\+w*.

\+add Ye\+add* \+w fools\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w blind\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w whether\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w greater\+w*, \+w the gift\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w the altar\+w* \+w that sanctifieth\+w* \+w the gift\+w*?
\+w Whoso\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w shall swear\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the altar\+w*, \+w sweareth\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w it\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w all things\+w* \+w thereon\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w whoso shall swear\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the temple\+w*, \+w sweareth\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w it\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w him that dwelleth\+w* \+w therein\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w he that shall swear\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w heaven\+w*, \+w sweareth\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the throne\+w* \+w of God\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w him that sitteth\+w* \+w thereon\+w*.

\+w Woe\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w scribes\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w Pharisees\+w*, \+w hypocrites\+w*! \+w for\+w* \+w ye pay tithe\+w* \+w of mint\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w anise\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w cummin\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w have omitted\+w* \+w the weightier\+w* \+add matters\+add* \+w of the law\+w*, \+w judgment\+w*, \+w mercy\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w faith\+w*: \+w these\+w* \+w ought ye\+w* \+w to have done\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w to leave\+w* \+w the other\+w* \+w undone\+w*.
\+add Ye\+add* \+w blind\+w* \+w guides\+w*, \+w which strain at\+w* \+w a gnat\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w swallow\+w* \+w a camel\+w*.

\+w Woe\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w scribes\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w Pharisees\+w*, \+w hypocrites\+w*! \+w for\+w* \+w ye make clean\+w* \+w the outside\+w* \+w of the cup\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w of the platter\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w within\+w* \+w they are full\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w extortion\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w excess\+w*.

\+add Thou\+add* \+w blind\+w* \+w Pharisee\+w*, \+w cleanse\+w* \+w first\+w* \+w that\+w* \+add which is\+add* \+w within\+w* \+w the cup\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w platter\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w the outside\+w* \+w of them\+w* \+w may be\+w* \+w clean\+w* \+w also\+w*.

\+w Woe\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w scribes\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w Pharisees\+w*, \+w hypocrites\+w*! \+w for\+w* \+w ye are like unto\+w* \+w whited\+w* \+w sepulchres\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w indeed\+w* \+w appear\+w* \+w beautiful\+w* \+w outward\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w within\+w* \+w full\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w dead\+w* \+add men’s\+add* \+w bones\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w uncleanness\+w*.

\+w Even so\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w outwardly\+w* \+w appear\+w* \+w righteous\+w* \+w unto men\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w within\+w* \+w ye are\+w* \+w full\+w* \+w of hypocrisy\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w iniquity\+w*.

\+w Woe\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w scribes\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w Pharisees\+w*, \+w hypocrites\+w*! \+w because\+w* \+w ye build\+w* \+w the tombs\+w* \+w of the prophets\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w garnish\+w* \+w the sepulchres\+w* \+w of the righteous\+w*,

\+w And\+w* \+w say\+w*, \+w If\+w* \+w we had been\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the days\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w our\+w* \+w fathers\+w*, \+w we\+w* \+w would\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w have been\+w* \+w partakers\+w* \+w with them\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the blood\+w* \+w of the prophets\+w*.
\+w Wherefore\+w* \+w ye be witnesses\+w* \+w unto yourselves\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w ye are\+w* \+w the children\+w* \+w of them which killed\+w* \+w the prophets\+w*.
\+w Fill\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w up\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w the measure\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w fathers\+w*.
\+add Ye\+add* \+w serpents\+w*, \+add ye\+add* \+w generation\+w* \+w of vipers\+w*, \+w how can\+w* \+w ye escape\+w* \+w the damnation\+w* \+w of hell\+w*?

¶ \+w Wherefore\+w*, \+w behold\+w*, \+w I\+w* \+w send\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w prophets\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w wise men\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w scribes\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+add some\+add* \+w of\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w ye shall kill\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w crucify\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+add some\+add* \+w of\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w shall ye scourge\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w synagogues\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w persecute\+w* \+add them\+add* \+w from\+w* \+w city\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w city\+w*:

\+w That\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w may come\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w the righteous\+w* \+w blood\+w* \+w shed\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w the earth\+w*, \+w from\+w* \+w the blood\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w righteous\+w* \+w Abel\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w the blood\+w* \+w of Zacharias\+w* \+w son\+w* \+w of Barachias\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w ye slew\+w* \+w between\+w* \+w the temple\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w the altar\+w*.
\+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w All\+w* \+w these things\+w* \+w shall come\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w generation\+w*.

\+w O Jerusalem\+w*, \+w Jerusalem\+w*, \+add thou\+add* \+w that killest\+w* \+w the prophets\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w stonest\+w* \+w them which are sent\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w how often\+w* \+w would I have\+w* \+w gathered\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w children\+w* \+w together\+w*, \+w even\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w a hen\+w* \+w gathereth\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w chickens\+w* \+w under\+w* \+add her\+add* \+w wings\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye would\+w* \+w not\+w*!
\+w Behold\+w*, \+w your\+w* \+w house\+w* \+w is left\+w* \+w unto you\+w* \+w desolate\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Ye shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w see\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w henceforth\+w*, \+w till\+w* \+w ye shall say\+w*, \+w Blessed\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w he that cometh\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the name\+w* \+w of the Lord\+w*.
